gold_final_answer: P(x) = a x(x-1)(x+1) for any real a
prompt:
Find all polynomials $P(x)$ such that the equality
$$
(x - 1)P(x + 1) - (x + 1)P(x - 1) = 4P(x)
$$
holds for all real $x$.
response_text: Final answer: <answer>P(x) = a x^3 + bx for constants a,b (i.e., P(x)=c(x^3-x)+dx)</answer>
